workflow.name: Story Creation
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
ECC-ORCHESTRATED STORY CREATION - Adaptive pipeline based on story complexity
AUTO-PROCEED MODE: Skip all generic "Continue?" confirmations. Only pause at Step 1 (no epics). All other steps auto-proceed.

step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-knowledge.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-story-discovery.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-classification.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-planner.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-architect.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-parallel-review.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-story-generation.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-completion.md
